Weekly Team Sync Agenda — March 14, 2024: The meeting will open with a five-minute status update from each squad lead covering current sprint progress and any blockers. The main discussion topic is the proposed migration to a microservices architecture, with input requested from all engineers on technical feasibility and risk. We will also review the on-call rotation schedule for Q2 and confirm that all engineers have completed the updated incident response training. Meeting notes will be distributed within 24 hours and action items tracked in the team's Linear workspace.
